remarks: A hidden gem w value for price! 2026 REMODELED 2 bedrm sunny corner unit in a residential neighborhd of recent million $ homes sold steps away in historic Hubbard Heights. HOA incl HEAT H/W COOKING GAS and even PROPERTY TAXES! D/R is a versatile room for office, gym etc. Priv. parking. Laundry. STEPS AWAY are 2 city parks (Scalzi & Mill River) UCONN, library, mall, downtown dining, public golf, gyms & hospital, all while living in a secluded tree lined mid-city area. Express train to NYC 52 min (4 min car & 16 min walk/train). Live in this spacious designed floor-plan CO-OP, among ONLY OWNERS. Priv. club room avail. Benches/picnic tables for outside enjoyment. Elevator access allows owners to arrive at their unit from the parking lot all w/out having to ascend not even 1 step! EV charging stations are another convenience! An elementary/middle school w NEW playgrnd is on the corner across the street. Many new out of state recent owners. The Greenwich town line is 1.8 mi from River Haven. Easy access to train, I-95 and Merritt Pkwy. Super lives onsite. Quick closing! Listing Agent is TINA ANGELOS for Financing Details/or for Apprvd CT Co-op LENDERS /No NY. Great alternative to renting or 1st ownership. Many owners also own other multiple properties elsewhere and own as PT living! The River Haven family awaits you! Unit WAS *TempOffMkt while ListAg was out of country!
